# Recon summary (fixture)

Frozen recon for the E2E fixture suite. Mirrors a Juice-Shop-style Node.js monolith
with a REST API (`routes/`) and an in-process auth library (`lib/insecurity.ts`).

- Runtime: Node.js 20, TypeScript
- Frameworks: Express, Sequelize, Angular frontend
- Auth: JWT (RS256, key committed in repo)
- Manifests discovered: `package.json`, `tsconfig.json`, `Dockerfile`
- High-risk surfaces: `routes/login.ts`, `routes/search.ts`, `lib/insecurity.ts`
